fullOutput:
Push the current branch and create/update its PR

Usage: ez push [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --draft                  Create a draft PR
      --no-draft               Override draft config to create a ready-for-review PR
      --no-pr                  Push the branch without creating or updating a PR
      --title <TITLE>          PR title (defaults to first commit message)
      --body <BODY>            PR body text
      --body-file <BODY_FILE>  PR body from file
      --base <BASE>            Override the PR base branch
      --stack                  Push all branches in the stack (equivalent to ez submit)
  -a, --all                    Stage all tracked changes before committing (requires -m)
  -A, --all-files              Stage all changes, including untracked files, before committing (requires -m)
  -m, --message <MESSAGE>      Commit with this message before pushing
      --repo <REPO>            Target repository for PR creation (owner/repo), overrides config
      --remote <REMOTE>        Git remote to push to (overrides config), stored per-branch on first use
  -h, --help                   Print help

Examples:
  ez push
  ez push --title "feat: add auth" --body "Adds login/logout."
  ez push --draft
  ez push --stack
  ez push -am "feat: add auth"
  ez push -Am "feat: add auth and new snapshots"
   ez push --repo owner/repo
  ez push --remote fork --repo owner/repo
